hero.tagline: Find complete info, TCG card galleries, to competitive deck recommendations for over

body.not_found_desc: Pokémon "{{searchTerm}}" is not in the Pokédex.

tcg.title: Trading Card Game Gallery
tcg.no_cards: No TCG cards found for this Pokémon.
tcg.scroll_hint: Scroll horizontally to explore collectible cards for {{pokemonName}}.

about.description: A modern Pokédex web application built with React and various Pokémon APIs, featuring full data, TCG card galleries, and competitive deck recommendations.
about.dev_desc: A passionate web developer with modern technology. This project was created as an exploration of React, public API integration, and interactive UI/UX design.

features.pokedex_desc: Complete data of 1,025+ Pokémon from all generations — stats, types, abilities, and descriptions.
features.tcg_desc: Official Trading Card Game card gallery based on the Pokémon being viewed, with interactive horizontal scroll.
features.meta_desc: Competitive deck recommendations for Pokémon TCG Pocket, complete with team partners and strategy.
features.theme_desc: Toggle dark or light theme — preferences automatically saved for the next session.

footer.tagline: Explore over 1,025+ Pokémon — Built with PokeAPI & TCG API

pikachu.name: Pikachu EX Aggro (PTCG Pocket)
pikachu.description: Super aggressive deck relying on Pikachu EX and fast pressure in the early game. Highly feared in the current Pokémon TCG Pocket meta.

mewtwo.name: Mewtwo EX Control (PTCG Pocket)
mewtwo.description: Tier 1 deck that dominates the late game. Gardevoir is used to accelerate Psychic energy attachment to Mewtwo EX.

charizard.name: Charizard EX Ramp (PTCG Pocket)
charizard.description: Focus on defending in the early game to gather energy, then use Moltres EX to accelerate the setup of Charizard EX which can deal massive damage for instant KOs.

starmie.name: Starmie EX / Articuno (PTCG Pocket)
starmie.description: Very fast water deck relying on Misty to charge energy in a single turn. With luck, this deck can win in the first few turns.

articuno.name: Starmie EX / Articuno (PTCG Pocket)
articuno.description: Very fast water deck relying on Misty to charge energy in a single turn. With luck, this deck can win in the first few turns.

venusaur.name: Venusaur EX Tank (PTCG Pocket)
venusaur.description: Thanks to very high HP and healing from Erika, Venusaur becomes a defensive wall that is very difficult for aggro decks to take down.

gengar.name: Gengar ex Disruption
gengar.description: A deck that manipulates the opponent's hand and field, Gengar is often used for status conditions and damage spreading.

arcanine.name: Arcanine ex Turbo
arcanine.description: Arcanine has huge damage but quickly discards its own energy. Needs a fast energy acceleration partner.
